title: Victory for Badgers in one day match
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers Colts team recently had mixed success against their Boland opponents in the Cricket SA Provincial Colts competition.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers Colts team recently had mixed success against their Boland opponents in the Cricket SA Provincial Colts competition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In a series of matches that was hosted at Boland Park in Paarl, the Boland won the three-day match from the last ball of the match after they successfully chased a target of 176 runs from 35 overs with two wickets still in hand."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hayden Sweet, the skipper of the Badgers, excelled with the bat with contributions of 80 runs in both the first and second innings. Liyabona Malife (6/91) and (3/47) bagged nine wickets in the match.","html":"Hayden Sweet, the skipper of the Badgers, excelled with the bat with contributions of 80 runs in both the first and second innings. Liyabona Malife (6/91) and (3/47) bagged nine wickets in the match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the 50-over match of Sunday, the Badgers amassed 257/7 thanks to half-centuries by Matthew Christensen (89) and Heath Richards (55).","html":"In the 50-over match of Sunday, the Badgers amassed 257/7 thanks to half-centuries by Matthew Christensen (89) and Heath Richards (55)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks to a match-winning bowling performance by Grant Esau (3/29) and Malife (4/49), the Boland was dismissed for 176 runs as the Badgers won by 81 runs.","html":"Thanks to a match-winning bowling performance by Grant Esau (3/29) and Malife (4/49), the Boland was dismissed for 176 runs as the Badgers won by 81 runs."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The summarised scorecards are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Three Day match","html":"Three Day match"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS COLTS 1st innings 221 all out","html":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS COLTS 1st innings 221 all out"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"(Mark Andrianatos 52, Hayden Sweet 80, Ethan Cunningham 2/32, Adrian du Toit 4/71, Boago Gaoraelwe 2/27)","html":"(Mark Andrianatos 52, Hayden Sweet 80, Ethan Cunningham 2/32, Adrian du Toit 4/71, Boago Gaoraelwe 2/27)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd innings 235 (Hayden Sweet 80, Heath Richards 46, Liabona Malife 28, Thurstin Murphy 26, Ethan Cunningham 2/42, Lehan Botha 2/47, Boago Gaoraelwe 3/50)","html":"2nd innings 235 (Hayden Sweet 80, Heath Richards 46, Liabona Malife 28, Thurstin Murphy 26, Ethan Cunningham 2/42, Lehan Botha 2/47, Boago Gaoraelwe 3/50)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BOLAND COLTS 1st innings 281 all out (David Christie 62, Kent Goedeke 112, Adrian du Toit 33, Enathi Kitshini 2/63, Liyabona Malife 6/91)","html":"BOLAND COLTS 1st innings 281 all out (David Christie 62, Kent Goedeke 112, Adrian du Toit 33, Enathi Kitshini 2/63, Liyabona Malife 6/91)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd innings 176/8 (Kent Goedeke 38, Lehan Botha 36, Riaz Palekar 50, Enathi Kitshini 3/64, Liyabona Malife 3/47)","html":"2nd innings 176/8 (Kent Goedeke 38, Lehan Botha 36, Riaz Palekar 50, Enathi Kitshini 3/64, Liyabona Malife 3/47)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Boland Colts won by 2 wickets.","html":"Boland Colts won by 2 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One-Day match","html":"One-Day match"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS COLTS 257/7 – 50 overs (Mark Andrianatos 32, Matthew Christensen 89, Heath Richards 55, Imraan Manack 3/58, Adrian du Toit 2/29)","html":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS COLTS 257/7 – 50 overs (Mark Andrianatos 32, Matthew Christensen 89, Heath Richards 55, Imraan Manack 3/58, Adrian du Toit 2/29)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BOLAND COLTS 176 all out – 37.5 overs (Kent Goedeke 32, Lehan Botha 45, Riaz Palekar 57, Grant Esau 3/29, Mesuli Vuba 2/32, Liyabona Malife 4/49)","html":"BOLAND COLTS 176 all out – 37.5 overs (Kent Goedeke 32, Lehan Botha 45, Riaz Palekar 57, Grant Esau 3/29, Mesuli Vuba 2/32, Liyabona Malife 4/49)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers Colts won by 81 runs.","html":"Garden Route Badgers Colts won by 81 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
